articles.title: Ripple, ConsenSys participate in Mastercard program to promote CBDC innovation
articles.description: The payment processor has enlisted a range of market players in its quest for innovation and efficiencies in a technology that 93% of central banks are investigating.

articles.title: WSJ Claims Elon Musk’s Company SpaceX Sold the Bitcoin It Held in 2021-2022
articles.description: According to the information of the Wall Street Journal based on its own sources, SpaceX sold 373 million dollars of Bitcoin. Continue Reading: WSJ Claims Elon Musk’s Company SpaceX Sold the Bitcoin It Held in 2021-2022

articles.title: Shibarium Developer Claims ‘All Is Well’ After ‘Massive Influx’ to Shiba Inu (SHIB) Layer-2 Solution
articles.description: The lead developer of memecoin Shiba Inu (SHIB) says that the project’s new layer-2 scaling solution Shibarium is doing just fine after experiencing a “massive influx” of users. In a new blog post, the pseudonymous head of Shiba Inu, developer Shytoshi Kusama, says that “all is well” with Shibarium after being inundated by users and […]

articles.title: Buying The Dip? Shiba Inu Whale Activity Surges As Price Declines Nearly 10%
articles.description: Shiba Inu (SHIB), a dog-inspired meme coin, originally dismissed by many as just another fleeting fad, is now drawing serious attention from big players, or “whales,” in the crypto space. This attention comes amid the tokens’ recent sloppy launch of its other project, Shibarium. Blockchain security team Beosin recently reported that the newly deployed Shibarium platform has had transactions...

articles.title: Shiba Inu Shibarium Faces Technical Issues Just Hours After Launch

articles.title: SHIB, XRP, SAND, CAKE All See Increase In Whale Activity
articles.description: Whale activity for Shiba Inu (SHIB), Ripple (XRP), The Sandbox (SAND), and PancakeSwap (CAKE) has been increasing according to a Twitter post shared by the market intelligence platform, Santiment. This is likely due to the fact that there has been a bit of a downturn in the cryptocurrency market and these whales are capitalizing on […]
